name: Marcus Webb — No Heat
staffBriefing: Marcus Webb is home alone at 2 Jackson Street, San Francisco, CA 94111 (Jackson Square, near the Embarcadero). His boiler stopped producing heat overnight — no warm radiators anywhere, no hot water either. He reset it and checked the pilot light himself, no luck. It's a damp, foggy 48°F outside and the house feels freezing without any heat. It's never given him trouble before — it just died last night (this signals a 'No Heat' repair call, not routine 'Boiler Service' maintenance on a working system). If asked about cooling or AC, remind them it's the dead of winter — that's not the issue. Give his phone number and full address (including city/state/zip) only if asked.
